transcription.text: This is a lot of house for only one woman to do, but when I clean, I feel like an army, cause I am! Armed with Ajax, I have a feeling of cleaning power! Ajax All-Purpose Cleaner has the power of ammonia, plus a powerful grease-cutting solvent to clean greasy floors and walls like a white tornado. Get that feeling of cleaning power! Armed with Ajax!

segments.text: This is a lot of house for only one woman to do, but when I clean, I feel like an army, cause I am!

metadata.title: Ajax All-Purpose Cleaner Armed with Ajax 1979
